◎简　　介  

　　Ever meet a dog and wonder what breed it is? Where it gets its looks? Its non-stop energy? Every day dog owners across America speculate exactly what their mutts are made of. 'Who's Your Doggie?' finally has the answer. In this one-hour special we take six dogs and dig deep into their family roots. After owners explain their mutt's curious behaviors and physical traits, we brin...
